textByHash.0873d2e53ee03ffd14fd59dfdd1e3ef5b5e3e431: Nilsal. What can I do for you?
textByHash.0fa922b78fde2400743b9096748502cc0e40ba91: Nilsal, iknami. What can I do for you?
textByHash.1ca9c939dd2f1330c69e49999c407b1760788cb6: Ah, yes... It's a sad day when a town doesn't worry about its missing children...
textByHash.2251249a8b13f15cc6afa7a892cc0d44ff407aa9: There is a penalty for failing them.
textByHash.2661329473849f519c674d58fe7d4f46d7c8fb00: That's a shame... Hopefully you have some luck soon.
textByHash.29f7c85729e5d945577d91b83c6874cf058fd05e: Hello there. How can I help you?
textByHash.3e864dfaec3e85263b2bb605942353a6b41e7672: What can I do for you, iknami?
textByHash.492f77266a480a1f90c7fda41b1d8b0c7550d349: I think we could be doing more. Something is happening and it doesn't feel right. I know I'm not the only one who feels this way.
textByHash.4ff381bc518bdc7c6a5ed1853807b628b3f0097b: Well... if you're sure, fetch your friend and then head east to the Twilight Temple. I will send word for them to expect you both.
textByHash.55e09a745facb2d01e717a9fcb6eb50bea876a23: Well, that depends on who you ask... Some try to rationalise it away as some accident in the forest, the river, or the mountains.
textByHash.6959d87d3190db8c35d428b8ec68dc89cc2f37a8: Well I'm always happy to help those less fortunate than I, but you don't really look like you need that sort of thing.
textByHash.6b65e0406dd7ba126c3492fd76a2899691d39a8e: Are you a fool? Keep your voice down!
textByHash.770aa2fcfd7bf14e2579576b81eea1b6a06f5b9d: Hello there. Looking for some supplies?
textByHash.7a228b23fa1673818362c484f4489e775160823d: You know there are tests you'd need to pass, right? Not everyone can be considered worthy.
textByHash.8ab048e2c5e9e78af8cdef63d3b60b8e8e117367: They were at first, but with how long it's been happening, I think everyone's run out of energy to keep searching.
textByHash.90782c8eaed6d4448100cf7e2c928e2571534dc3: You want to join the Emissaries?
textByHash.93f02f6e3e489610fe658635684cd1eec9919425: All sorts of things. Why not take a look?
textByHash.9e062a42fb71830c0ac9bf0bcf1fcaf5bfbe46d6: Hello there. What can I do for you?
textByHash.a203a7e57ac0f4b6888712bca83b72d60cff701b: I already told you to keep your voice down! Fetch your friend and then head east to the Twilight Temple. I will send word for them to expect you both.
textByHash.acc2f7e761096bfcf175e83208bdcd8d85ca8a08: Others just assume they up and left overnight. Took only the essentials to go and start a new life.
textByHash.ae77d0da0cec5dade89e3f44a071343fbbe630de: Then of course, some think they're getting taken in the night...
textByHash.d52a5c3cd1b7f2011948ea22331f3c63b99821b5: Thank you for the offer, but I'm not really looking for help right now.
textByHash.e2162eddf270885b674dde8b635d5afa9fcfde34: Did you manage to find out anything?
